task_objective: Implement the updater plan: add detailed frontend/backend update logging, race Decky installer promise against a 3s timeout (updating copy to 'Waiting for Decky...'), wrap the update button spinner in a fixed 16px container to prevent layout shifting, and add logging privacy/regression tests.
design_decisions: Implemented frontend traceId generation and routed update events to the RPC log path. Used Promise.race in PluginUpdateSection.tsx to race installerPromise with a 3s setTimeout. If timeout fires, set handoffPending state to change text to 'Waiting for Decky...' and continue awaiting the installerPromise in a separate execution branch. Wrapped the Spinner in a CSS-constrained container (width/height/flex 16px, overflow hidden). Handled backend logger updates with a resilient formatting helper formatting candidate dicts safely. Used sys.modules mock reloading in testing mock cache contexts.
results: All tests (433 backend and static frontend tests) pass successfully. Type checking and Ruff lint/formatting validations are clean.
